title: No Movie References
description: This pack removes movie-related splash texts, replaces the Lava Chicken music disc with a track from Minecraft's past and renames the Dennis painting
body:
Enjoy the blissful ignorance of gaslighting yourself that the movie never happened with the help of this pack!

- Who's Dennis?
- _Lava Chicken_? You mean _Eleven_?
- Brainrot references? Don't know what you're talking about

[Edited version of _calm4_](https://www.mediafire.com/file/wd9y9tvsgkqfo24/file) (in [v1.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nmr/version/1.0)) made by [henlo :3](https://www.youtube.com/@random_music_channel)
